properties.displayName: Nessus - Brute Force Against Web UI
properties.description: Detects multiple failed login attempts to the Nessus web UI from the same source IP within a short window. May indicate credential stuffing or brute force against the scanner.
properties.query:
NessusLogs
| where LogType == "WebAccess"
| where WebUriPath has_any ("/session", "/token") and WebMethod == "POST" and WebStatusCode == 401
| summarize FailedAttempts=count() by WebSrcIP, bin(TimeGenerated, 10m)
| where FailedAttempts >= 5
| extend AccountCustomEntity = WebSrcIP, IPCustomEntity = WebSrcIP
